key_insights.insight: Focus on creating something useful and authentic for your audience to build a strong community and brand.
key_insights.quote: There's always space for someone to do it in a more authentic better way I think in anything in the world and that's what you've got to do you've got to be comfortable to be yourself not to kind of take ideas from other people back to bring your ideas to the table and really engage with people in a personal way because I think people are inspired by people.

key_insights.insight: Deep engagement with your audience can be a more effective marketing strategy than spending millions on traditional marketing.
key_insights.quote: We see our sales and shops and we're outselling people who are spending millions on their marketing and I do think that that real deep engagement with people is really really interesting.

key_insights.insight: A lack of purpose can significantly impact mental health and well-being.
key_insights.quote: When I felt like I had nothing else to do and there was no sense of purpose, that was when I felt my most low and I come back to that a lot.

key_insights.insight: It's important to be conscious of your social media consumption and be aware of what's good for you and what's not.
key_insights.quote: It's just conscious kind of viewing and being aware of what's good for us and what's not.

key_insights.insight: The success of a business depends heavily on the team, and empowering that team to use their strengths is everything.
key_insights.quote: Behind that, the reason that we're a success is the team and empowering that team to do what they do really well is everything.

key_insights.insight: When scaling a business, hiring people who are experts in areas where you lack experience is essential for growth.
key_insights.quote: We've got to be the dumbest people in the room. Like we need to go out and hire people who have brilliant expertise and things that we don't have, which is 100 percent the right approach.

key_insights.insight: Working with a partner requires clear division of responsibilities based on strengths and a united front in decision-making.
key_insights.quote: If it's a big decision, we'll talk about it on our own and then bring a united front to a meeting because I think I'm always conscious that for people it must be weird in some capacity working with a husband and wife team and so I wouldn't want to make anybody else feel uncomfortable by us bringing it into the meeting room

actionable_advice.advice: To build a personal brand, deeply engage with your community by being personal and authentic on social media.
actionable_advice.how_to: Reply to comments, share useful content like easy recipes or tutorials, and be selective about what you share to maintain boundaries.

actionable_advice.advice: If struggling with a difficult situation, identify small actions you can take to move in a positive direction.
actionable_advice.how_to: Reach out to a friend, be honest about your feelings, or try a new hobby or activity that provides a sense of purpose.

actionable_advice.advice: Be conscious when you are using social media.
actionable_advice.how_to: Be aware of the kind of content you are engaging with. If you feel down about yourself, stop engaging with accounts that post certain types of content that triggers these feelings

memorable_stories: Ella's story of starting Deliciously Ella from her parents' kitchen after struggling with illness and mental health.
The story of developing energy balls from a personal craving for sweets into a popular product line.
Ella's anecdote about sitting down with her first employees and not knowing what questions to ask them.
contrarian_claims: Deep engagement with your audience can be more effective than spending millions on marketing.
episode_title: The Diary Of A CEO with Steven Bartlett - E20: Deliciously Ella - Blogging Saved My Life
